errors.message: Galaxy Interactive Tools are temporarily disabled, but should be available again within 24 hours (on May 1).
Upload parameter space_to_tab accepts only Yes on this Galaxy upload tool; using No rejected all prepared files.
errors.response: Removed invalid parameter and resubmitted uploads.

errors.message: DESeq2 API payload used wrong conditional selector, causing duplicate count-file inputs.
sample-sheet mode selector not honored by Galaxy API submission; job again duplicated one file.
errors.response: Submitted DESeq2 using datasets_per_level with explicit ASXL1 and Control sample file sets.
